# PptMaker

**Agent-only.** The user attaches a `.hwp` — you run the workflow in `.cursor/skills/pptmaker/SKILL.md`.

**You design the slides.** Scripts extract HWP content; you write polished, readable `slides/*.html` with strong typography and varied layouts. Do not ship auto-generated draft HTML as the final deck.

**Keep it tight:** ~12–18 slides with only important HWP facts. Merge sparse sections; never ship an empty-looking slide — redesign or fold content elsewhere.

Do not ask the user to run terminal commands.
